title: National Internet Outage
description: A major internet backbone fails, disrupting banking, hospitals, and communication.

C.title: Allow ISPs to handle the crisis independently

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Nationalizing routing is government overreach. ISPs should manage their own networks.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: And when they fail, the economy collapses. Outages have shown how fragile the system is.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Redundancy upgrades are fine, but forced control is dangerous.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Dangerous is letting private companies control national infrastructure without oversight.
